items.original_title: Oil soars to $100 on fresh Mideast attacks
items.rss_summary:
Oil prices surged to $100 a barrel on Thursday as Tehran-backed Houthi rebels targeted Red Sea shipping and US President Donald Trump threatened to strike them in return.
International benchmark oil contract Brent North Sea soared more than six percent to hit the symbolic $100 level, as the attacks potentially opened a new front in the Middle East war and Trump threatened the Houthis with "major military punishment".

items.title: RT от @WhiteHouse: Помощь при стихийных бедствиях — это не расплата для преступников. @POTUS, @VP Vance и @fema работают над тем, чтобы помощь не попадала в руки мошенников и доходила только до тех, кто в ней действительно нуждается. 🇺🇸
items.original_title: RT by @WhiteHouse: Disaster assistance is not a payday for criminals. @POTUS, @VP Vance, and @fema are working to ensure aid stays out of the hands of fraudsters and only reaches those who truly need it. 🇺🇸
items.rss_summary:
Disaster assistance is not a payday for criminals. 

@POTUS, @VP Vance, and @fema are working to ensure aid stays out of the hands of fraudsters and only reaches those who truly need it. 🇺🇸


FEMA (@fema)

Earlier this year, a Pennsylvania woman was sentenced to 5 years in prison after pleading guilty to a scheme that defrauded FEMA of more than $1.7M following Hurricane Ida. Disaster assistance is not payday for criminals. Taking funds meant for survivors is a serious crime.





— https://nitt
